body_plan.core_shape: single large rounded head-blob, no visible body or torso
body_plan.symmetry: bilateral but drawn asymmetrically (mismatched eyes and ears)

parts.shape: large rounded floppy oval, one taller/narrower and one shorter/wider, each with a smaller pink oval/rectangle inside
parts.placement: top of head, asymmetrically sized and angled, separated by a gap

parts.shape: one large round circle with small pink pupil dot (left eye), one squarish rounded shape with a smaller circle pupil (right eye) — mismatched shapes
parts.placement: front of face, uneven height and size

parts.shape: long wavy curved line, smile-like squiggle
parts.placement: lower half of face, off-center curving down-right

parts.shape: thin straight or slightly curved lines
parts.placement: one on upper right side near ear, two below chin/jaw pointing downward
left side of face near jaw, extending outward like a stray whisker or mark

distinctive_features: no body, arms, or legs drawn — creature exists as a floating head only
ears are mismatched in size and shape, one noticeably taller than the other
eyes are different shapes (one round, one squarish) giving a lopsided expression
wavy smiling mouth gives a content, goofy look
stray whisker-like lines emerge from jaw, cheek, and near the ear at odd angles
locomotion: presumed stationary or floating head-form; no limbs drawn, so movement (if any) is by rolling or bouncing on its rounded head-body
vibe: a happy, lopsided floating bunny-head with mismatched ears and eyes and stray whiskers sticking out every which way
